title: tengine.diag.wt_schedule v1
description: Schedule anomaly event: emitted when an on_dirty work type dispatches in ≥90% of the observation window frames. This indicates the dirty flag is stuck or the WT is effectively activation:always despite its TSDL declaration. Known examples: WT 261 (sky_lut_baker) and WT 447 (cloud_baker) dispatch every frame despite on_dirty 12 declaration, suggesting DIRTY_SKY is never cleared.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which this anomaly was detected

window_frames.description: observation window size in rendered frames

name.description: work type name from TSDL manifest

declared_activation.description: always 'on_dirty' — only on_dirty WTs are flagged; always-WTs are expected to dispatch every frame

observed_fire_frames.description: number of frames in which this WT was observed dispatching within the window

anomaly.description: anomaly classifier; 'every_frame_despite_on_dirty' means the WT fired in ≥90% of window frames despite being declared on_dirty
